kirundi.lavoisier_1789_conservation_of_mass_tr: Lavoisier 1789: kubungabunga misa. Ubwenge ni koefisiyenti (SI umubare wo hasi). 2H₂ + O₂ → 2H₂O. Ringaniza ivyuma mbere, hanyuma ibitari ivyuma, hanyuma hydrogène na oxygène nyuma.
kirundi.synthesis_a_b_ab_decomposition_ab_a_b_: Ihuriro (A+B→AB), gutandukanya (AB→A+B), gusimbura kumwe (A+BC→AC+B), gusimbura kabiri (AB+CD→AD+CB), gutwika (CxHy + O₂ → CO₂ + H₂O). 95% vy'ingingo z'ishure ziri muri kimwe muri vyo.
kirundi.1_mole_6_022_10_particles_avogadro_mol: Mole 1 = uduce 6.022×10²³ (Avogadro). Misa ya molar = igiteranyo c'imisa ya atome. Garama → mole → mole → garama. Ikiraro hagati y'ingingo zaringanijwe n'ingano za laboratwari.
kirundi.lab_safety_ghs_symbols_emergency_respo: Umutekano wa laboratwari — ibimenyetso GHS + igisubizo c'ivyihutirwa
kirundi.9_ghs_pictograms_explosive_flammable_o: Ibishushanyo 9 vya GHS: biturika, biraka, oxidizing, gaze ifite umuvuduko, gisenya, uburozi, biryana, akaga k'ibidukikije, akaga k'ubuzima. Aside mu mazi (ntukigire mu buryo bunyuranye) — gusanzara birakomeye.
kirundi.beginner_naming_counting_atoms_interme: Intanguriro = kwita amazina + kubara atome; Hagati = kuringaniza; Hejuru = imibare ya mole + reagent ntarengwa. Ingingo za AP Chem 1–6. NGSS HS-PS1.
kirundi.speed_builds_automaticity_once_balanci: Umuvuduko wubaka gukora vyikora. Iyo kuringaniza + kwita amazina bikoze vyikora, ububiko bw'akazi burabohorwa ku kwiyumvira ku rwego rwo hejuru, nka guhanura ishirwaho ry'ibicuruzwa n'impinduka z'uburinganire.
kirundi.k_2_matter_is_stuff_3_5_matter_cycles_: K-2: ikintu ni ikintu. 3-5: ikintu kizenguruka. MS: atome + ibigize vyoroshe. HS: kwiyumvira kuzuye hamwe n'imbonerahamwe y'ibihe. AP: thermodynamics + kinetics + uburinganire. Guhuza kw'uruhande ruhagaze bunyura mu ishure ryose.
kirundi.autobalance_hint: Andika ibikora n'ibicuruzwa vyawe. Bikemurwa neza n'imibare yo kubungabunga atome — umwigisha wa AI ntabwo ari umuyobozi ku bwinshi bw'ibipimo na rimwe.
kirundi.balance_one_element_at_a_time_start_wi: • Ringaniza ikintu kimwe icarimwe • Tangura n'igizwe gikomeye cane • Reka O canke H ku iherezo
kirundi.protect_your_eyes_from_splashes_fumes_: Kingira amaso yawe ku gusanzara, umwotsi n'uduce. Ambara amadarubindi arinda mbere yo gutangura kandi ntukayakuremo kugeza isuku irangiye.
kirundi.nitrile_gloves_protect_against_most_la: Uduhu tw'amaboko twa nitrile turinda ku bwinshi bw'imiti ya laboratwari. Uhindure ako kanya nimba dutabutse canke dwanduye.
kirundi.use_the_wafting_technique_hold_the_con: Koresha uburyo bwo kuyungurura: fata icuma kure kandi ukoreshe ukuboko ukayobora umwuka buhoro ku izuru ryawe.
kirundi.chemical_contamination_is_invisible_ev: Ihumana ry'imiti ntibiboneka. Ndetse n'ibimenyetso ku maboko canke ku buso birashobora kumirwa.
kirundi.before_starting_any_lab_locate_the_nea: Mbere yo gutangura laboratwari iyo ari yo yose, shaka igikoresho co kuzimya umuriro ca hafi, sitasiyo yo koza amaso, dushi y'ivyihutirwa n'inzira zo gusohoka.
kirundi.no_matter_how_small_your_teacher_needs: Uko vyaba bito kose. Umwigisha wawe akeneye kubimenya kugira ngo afate ingamba zikwiye z'isuku n'umutekano.
kirundi.a_rogue_element_is_destabilizing_the_c: Ikintu c'inyeshamba kibangamira ubudahungabana bw'igizwe! Subiza ibibazo vya shimi kugira ngo ugarure ubudahungabana!
kirundi.answer_correctly_to_deal_damage_wrong_: Subiza neza kugira ngo utere igihombo. Ibisubizo bitari vyo bibangamira ubudahungabana bw'igizwe cawe!
kirundi.15_ready_to_use_classroom_labs_for_k_1: Laboratwari 15 z'ishure ziteguye gukoreshwa kuri K-12.
kirundi.common_chemistry_misconceptions_debunk: Ivyiyumviro bibi bisanzwe vya shimi vyahakanywe.
kirundi.chemistry_is_the_science_of_substances: Shimi ni siyanse y'ibintu + impinduka zavyo.
kirundi.now_you_have_the_tools_to_understand_t: Ubu ufite ibikoresho vyo gutahura isi wakozwemo.
kirundi.three_sliders_h_exponent_log_scale_buf: Ibinyereza bitatu: exponent ya H⁺ (igipimo ca log), ubushobozi bwa buffer, ubushuhe. Umuti werekana rumwe muri bande 5 za pH zitandukanye. Nta manota, nta guhishura — nyereza kandi witegereze.
kirundi.hypothesis_free_text_no_right_answer_h: Iciyumviro (inyandiko yigenga — nta gisubizo ciza): Buffer igira ingaruka ite ku isano ya H+ → pH?
kirundi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_the_third: Fata ibinyereza bibiri bihamye. Nyereza ica gatatu. Witegereze ibibaho.
kirundi.what_happens_to_pure_water_h_exp_7_as_: Ni iki kibaho ku mazi meza (exponent ya H⁺ = -7) igihe ubushuhe buhindutse?
kirundi.investigate_why_is_the_ph_scale_logari: Perereza: kuki igipimo ca pH ari logarithmic?
kirundi.i_think_i_understand_explain_in_own_wo: Ndumva numvise — sigura mu magambo yawe
kirundi.explain_how_h_concentration_buffering_: Sigura uko ubwinshi bwa H⁺, buffering n'ubushuhe bigena pH hamwe.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_5_band_ph_marker_: Icitonderwa c'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso ca pH gitandukanye ca bande 5; nta ntego yo korosha y'imibare; nta guhishura — ku bushake.
